channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov on how faith is a commitment to marginal…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov on how faith is a commitment to marginalized people:

“For me, the asset test of one’s faith is the depth of your commitment to the most marginalized members of the human family.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov on how faith is a commitment to marginalized people:

“For me, the asset test of one’s faith is the depth of your commitment to the most marginalized members of the human family.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: The Nirosta Steel shows, now both sold out, take place at Ni…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
The Nirosta Steel shows, now both sold out, take place at Night Club 101, the former space of the legendary Pyramid Club, where he played with Arthur Russell in the ‘80s.

stereogum.com/2505238/niro...
item.content:encoded:
The Nirosta Steel shows, now both sold out, take place at Night Club 101, the former space of the legendary Pyramid Club, where he played with Arthur Russell in the ‘80s.

stereogum.com/2505238/niro...

item.title: Alex Edkins, frontman of the hardcore band Metz, goes full p…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Alex Edkins, frontman of the hardcore band Metz, goes full power pop on his new solo album. n.pr/4fkaINF
item.content:encoded: Alex Edkins, frontman of the hardcore band Metz, goes full power pop on his new solo album. n.pr/4fkaINF

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov on reclaiming faith from the GOP: “I t…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov on reclaiming faith from the GOP:

“I think Democrats make a mistake when they cede the faith and values space to the right, especially since in more instances than not, it seems to me that [Republicans] have got the faith wrong.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov on reclaiming faith from the GOP:

“I think Democrats make a mistake when they cede the faith and values space to the right, especially since in more instances than not, it seems to me that [Republicans] have got the faith wrong.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: From laptop twee and tweemo to glitchy bedroom pop, a new ge…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: From laptop twee and tweemo to glitchy bedroom pop, a new generation of artists is reshaping the genre while preserving its tender, proudly dorky heart. Explore the shape of twee to come.
item.content:encoded: From laptop twee and tweemo to glitchy bedroom pop, a new generation of artists is reshaping the genre while preserving its tender, proudly dorky heart. Explore the shape of twee to come.

item.title: In a time when everyone is increasingly “online,” or “very o…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
In a time when everyone is increasingly “online,” or “very online,” or “too-online,” who were these people who seemed to be the most online — who were willingly, gleefully, balefully online?

Read: bit.ly/3SU2MLw
item.content:encoded:
In a time when everyone is increasingly “online,” or “very online,” or “too-online,” who were these people who seemed to be the most online — who were willingly, gleefully, balefully online?

Read: bit.ly/3SU2MLw

item.title: Artists create, even during times of chaos. In response to T…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Artists create, even during times of chaos. In response to Trump policies and ICE's incursions, arts organizations are leaning in to new ways of fostering community in ways large and small. n.pr/4wKy99Q
item.content:encoded: Artists create, even during times of chaos. In response to Trump policies and ICE's incursions, arts organizations are leaning in to new ways of fostering community in ways large and small. n.pr/4wKy99Q

item.title: In June, we asked you to share the best album of the year so…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description:
In June, we asked you to share the best album of the year so far.

While the community debated over the other albums on this list, the standout album was clear with an almost two-thousand-point lead over the No. 2 album.

Did your AOTY (so far) make the list? https://disc.gs/4pqaQ2P
item.content:encoded:
In June, we asked you to share the best album of the year so far.

While the community debated over the other albums on this list, the standout album was clear with an almost two-thousand-point lead over the No. 2 album.

Did your AOTY (so far) make the list? https://disc.gs/4pqaQ2P

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov on Jesus being the victim of “identity t…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov on Jesus being the victim of “identity theft” in American politics:

“Folks on the right often behave as if they own religion... Jesus is the biggest victim of identity theft in American culture right now.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov on Jesus being the victim of “identity theft” in American politics:

“Folks on the right often behave as if they own religion... Jesus is the biggest victim of identity theft in American culture right now.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: If atmospheric black metal is your thing, don't miss Wehmut'…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: If atmospheric black metal is your thing, don't miss Wehmut's upcoming Listening Party for IV: Sommer. Tomorrow, July 16th at 1:30 PM EDT.
item.content:encoded: If atmospheric black metal is your thing, don't miss Wehmut's upcoming Listening Party for IV: Sommer. Tomorrow, July 16th at 1:30 PM EDT.

item.title: The 'Oppenheimer' filmmaker outdoes himself with an IMAX-siz…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The 'Oppenheimer' filmmaker outdoes himself with an IMAX-sized tale of gods, monsters, and the original hero's journey. It's truly epic.

REVIEW: bit.ly/4hcGxu7
item.content:encoded:
The 'Oppenheimer' filmmaker outdoes himself with an IMAX-sized tale of gods, monsters, and the original hero's journey. It's truly epic.

item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: The Mix 115: Loukeman The Toronto artist shares a mix of va…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description:
The Mix 115: Loukeman

The Toronto artist shares a mix of varying moods, including some exclusive new material, and talks about finding a balance between "producer brain" and DJing, and more.

Check it: mixmag.net/feature/the-...
item.content:encoded:
The Mix 115: Loukeman

The Toronto artist shares a mix of varying moods, including some exclusive new material, and talks about finding a balance between "producer brain" and DJing, and more.

Check it: mixmag.net/feature/the-...

item.title: They were possibly the brightest pop boys of the 1980s, then…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
They were possibly the brightest pop boys of the 1980s, then they disappeared.

Inside the comeback we never thought would happen.

item.content:encoded:

item.title: For a sec I thought Milly Alcock (Supergirl) was wearing a S…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
For a sec I thought Milly Alcock (Supergirl) was wearing a Stereogum t-shirt. 🤦‍♂️

But ty Head Bonk for repping!

This week only: take 10% off any order at shop.stereogum.com with discount code PUSHIN.
item.content:encoded:
For a sec I thought Milly Alcock (Supergirl) was wearing a Stereogum t-shirt. 🤦‍♂️

But ty Head Bonk for repping!

This week only: take 10% off any order at shop.stereogum.com with discount code PUSHIN.

item.title: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores. n.pr/4gFtAsO
item.content:encoded: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores. n.pr/4gFtAsO

item.title: On the recent Bandcamp Electronic show, Sam Binga and Addiso…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: On the recent Bandcamp Electronic show, Sam Binga and Addison Groove have teamed up for a collab album Bags Inc that was built in 72 hours. They join Emily Dust to break down why the Midwest of the US was such a big influence on this project. Listen on Bandcamp Radio.
item.content:encoded: On the recent Bandcamp Electronic show, Sam Binga and Addison Groove have teamed up for a collab album Bags Inc that was built in 72 hours. They join Emily Dust to break down why the Midwest of the US was such a big influence on this project. Listen on Bandcamp Radio.

item.content:encoded:

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)

One of the other openers on Candlebox’s fall tour is the Verve Pipe. If you’re setting the dial for maximum ‘90s, check out Stereogum’s The Alternative Number Ones: “The Freshmen” is the subject of this week’s column.

item.content:encoded:

item.title: In his first interview since getting replaced in Guns N' Ros…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
In his first interview since getting replaced in Guns N' Roses, drummer Frank Ferrer looks back at his years with Axl Rose, Duff McKagan, and Slash.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
In his first interview since getting replaced in Guns N' Roses, drummer Frank Ferrer looks back at his years with Axl Rose, Duff McKagan, and Slash.

item.title: Candlebox’s ‘93 debut yielded a string of radio hits and wen…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Candlebox’s ‘93 debut yielded a string of radio hits and went quadruple platinum. Now, after the Mountain Goats released a song about a ‘90s band opening for the Seattle alt-rockers, John Darnielle, Jon Wurster, and Matt Douglas will get to experience that themselves.

stereogum.com/2505156/the-...
item.content:encoded:
Candlebox’s ‘93 debut yielded a string of radio hits and went quadruple platinum. Now, after the Mountain Goats released a song about a ‘90s band opening for the Seattle alt-rockers, John Darnielle, Jon Wurster, and Matt Douglas will get to experience that themselves.

stereogum.com/2505156/the-...

item.title: In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities said federal policy changes have affected them. Funding is harder to come by and they worry it's slowing progress in their field. n.pr/4fnjyKB
item.content:encoded: In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities said federal policy changes have affected them. Funding is harder to come by and they worry it's slowing progress in their field. n.pr/4fnjyKB

item.title: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the…

item.title: "I talk to a guy in a 'Claude Squad' shirt, who tells me tha…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"I talk to a guy in a 'Claude Squad' shirt, who tells me that morality is 'an intellectual artifact,' a 'convenient fiction similar to money.'"

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:

item.title: "At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like '…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like 'AI is wiser and kinder than us,' and 'flowers are moral progress,' and 'ethics is all engineering.'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
"At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like 'AI is wiser and kinder than us,' and 'flowers are moral progress,' and 'ethics is all engineering.'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’25 or 6 to 4′ Across Six Decades

Chicago has wrapped up just about every show they've ever played with this 1970 classic, even as they've changed their lineup more often than an NBA team.

🎸 bit.ly/4aTUxFi
item.content:encoded:
Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’25 or 6 to 4′ Across Six Decades

Chicago has wrapped up just about every show they've ever played with this 1970 classic, even as they've changed their lineup more often than an NBA team.

🎸 bit.ly/4aTUxFi
